definition.jp: 業務の最終的な責任を負う役職。一般的には、経営者（社長）を指す。「Chief Executive Officer」の略語
definition.zh: 承担业务最终责任的职位。一般指经营者（总裁）。「Chief Executive Officer」的缩写
definition.en: The position bearing ultimate responsibility for business operations. Generally refers to the manager (president). Abbreviation of "Chief Executive Officer"

definition.jp: 企業の4大経営資源（ヒト、モノ、カネ、情報）の1つである「情報」に関する仕事を担当する役職。CIOの主たる業務は情報システムの統括。「Chief Information Officer」の略語
definition.zh: 负责企业四大经营资源（人、物、钱、信息）之一「信息」相关工作的职位。首席信息官（CIO）的主要业务是统管信息系统。「Chief Information Officer」的缩写
definition.en: The position in charge of work related to "information," one of the four management resources of an enterprise (people, goods, money, information). The CIO's main duty is to oversee information systems. Abbreviation of "Chief Information Officer"

definition.jp: 業務を専門的な機能に分けて、各機能を単位として構成する組織
definition.zh: 将业务按专业职能划分，以各职能为单位构成的组织
definition.en: An organization that divides operations into specialized functions and is structured with each function as a unit

definition.jp: 製品別、顧客別、地域別などを単位として、事業の利益責任をもつように構成する組織
definition.zh: 以产品、客户、地区等为单位，承担业务利润责任而构成的组织
definition.en: An organization structured by product, customer, region, or similar units, bearing profit responsibility for the business

definition.jp: 社員が職能部門と事業部門の両方に所属する組織
definition.zh: 员工同时隶属于职能部门和事业部门的组织
definition.en: An organization in which employees belong to both functional and divisional departments

definition.jp: 各部門から専門家を集めて結成する一時的な組織
definition.zh: 从各部门召集专家组建的临时性组织
definition.en: A temporary organization formed by gathering specialists from each department

definition.jp: 子会社の株式を保有する親会社
definition.zh: 持有子公司股票的母公司
definition.en: A parent company that holds shares of subsidiaries

rows.jp: 業務（p.22）の最終的な責任を負う役職。一般的には、経営者（社長）を指す。「Chief Executive Officer」の略語
rows.zh: 对业务（p.22）承担最终责任的职位。一般指经营者（总经理）。是「Chief Executive Officer」的缩写
rows.en: The position that bears ultimate responsibility for operations (p.22). Generally refers to the manager (president). Abbreviation of "Chief Executive Officer"

rows.jp: 企業の4大経営資源（ヒト、モノ、カネ、情報）の1つである「情報」に関する仕事を担当する役職。CIOの主たる業務は情報システムの統括。「Chief Information Officer」の略語
rows.zh: 负责企业四大经营资源（人、物、钱、信息）之一的「信息」相关工作的职位。CIO的主要业务是统筹信息系统。是「Chief Information Officer」的缩写
rows.en: The position responsible for work related to "information", one of the Four Management Resources (people, goods, money, information) of a company. The CIO's main duty is the overall management of information systems. Abbreviation of "Chief Information Officer"
